round2_improvement_notes.linguistic: Agent correctly identified lack of linguistic evidence and pivoted to synthesizing other agents' findings to reach a confident conclusion.
round2_improvement_notes.landscape: Agent effectively integrated regulatory evidence (yellow lines) to reinforce the landscape-based hypothesis.
round2_improvement_notes.botanics: Agent successfully cross-referenced infrastructure evidence to distinguish between US and Mexico, refining the probability.
round2_improvement_notes.regulatory: Agent synthesized landscape and botany evidence to rule out Canada, demonstrating strong cross-domain synthesis.
round2_improvement_notes.meta: Agent integrated regulatory evidence (yellow lines) to strengthen the architectural and infrastructure analysis.

verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge provided a clear, evidence-based synthesis. It correctly identified the primary diagnostic features (yellow center line, concrete curbing, ranch-style architecture) and systematically eliminated plausible alternatives (Mexico, Canada) based on the specific combination of infrastructure and landscape cues.
